_comment: Words that browsers' native Thai segmenter (Intl.Segmenter, same dictionary WebKit/Blink use internally) splits at the wrong position, even though they're single atomic words a reader processes as one unit. Generated by scripts/thai-word-audit.mjs, hand-reviewed to drop ordinary multi-word phrases the audit tool's dictionary over-eagerly lexicalizes (e.g. เพื่อให้, ไม่ต้อง) -- see the accompanying blog post for why that filtering step matters. Applied at build time by scripts/apply-thai-word-joins.mjs via U+2060 WORD JOINER insertion -- never shipped to readers as code or dictionary data.
words: ปฏิบัติการ
